'''âb-n-v-j''' ('''kabanvejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:haemorrhage|haemorrhage]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-n-v-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:haemorrhage|haemorrhage]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-n-v-j
|-
! Lemma
| kabanvejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibanvejoko|thibanvejoko]] || [[word:jibanvejoko|jibanvejoko]] || [[word:shibanvejoko|shibanvejoko]] || [[word:kibanvejoko|kibanvejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubanvejoko|thuthubanvejoko]] || [[word:jujubanvejoko|jujubanvejoko]] || [[word:shushubanvejoko|shushubanvejoko]] || [[word:kukubanvejoko|kukubanvejoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
